title: Position-adjusted tyre pressure
summary: Interact tyre-window pressure with current position and position percentile to distinguish leaders, midfield, and backmarkers.
rationale: Pit incentives differ by track position. The export frequently preserved position transforms, while direct neighbor features were fragile; position-adjusted pressure is a simpler tactical proxy.
implementation_hint: Add interactions between compound-scaled tyre age or current finish pressure and raw `Position`, same-lap position percentile, top/mid/back flags, and lost-position amount.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Position can be entangled with pit cycles and race strength; pair it with current `PitStop` and fresh-tyre flags.
